evidence.snippet: The #1 Tethered Drone Supplier for the US Army

We are at the forefront of tethered-technology for a reason. Our [tethered drones](/tethered-drones-uas/) are fielded by branches of the Armed Forces and industry partners to provide a mobile ad-hoc network of flying communication or [persistent ISR](/applications/defense/persistent-isr-intelligence-surveillance-reconnaissance-drone-systems/) nodes.

items.notes: Designs and manufactures complete tethered UAS platforms (Sentry and Spectre); the #1 tethered drone supplier for the US Army.

evidence.snippet: The Hoverfly TeUAS provides military-grade surveillance, targeting, and communications relay for operating base security, battalion-level communications, ISR missions, and more.

Variable Height Antenna (VHA)
Extend tactical communications to 200 feet, creating a persistent, elevated comms bubble that keeps command agile and securely connected.
[Learn More](https://hoverflytech.com/hive/relay/)

items.notes: Tethered drones are explicitly designed and fielded as elevated communications relay nodes (Variable Height Antenna / MANET).

evidence.snippet: The #1 Tethered Drone Supplier for the US Army

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Designs, manufactures, and supports complete tethered UAS platforms (Sentry and Spectre) sold to the US Army and other armed forces branches.

items.name: Sentry

evidence.snippet:
Sentry is the blueprint for Tethered Drone innovation.
With an unparalleled legacy of deployments, this single-payload TeUAS is fielded and maintained by our armed forces and has evolved into a critical infrastructure asset for the Integrated Tactical Network.

items.notes: Single-payload tethered UAS, fielded by US Armed Forces as C4ISR platform.

items.name: Spectre

evidence.snippet: THE ONLY DIU BLUE LIST CERTIFIED TETHERED UAS

Purpose-built for radios and engineered for versatility, SPECTRE is the most advanced tethered drone available today. Augment and elevate your mission with greater payload capacity, multi-payload capabilities, AI-integrations, and persistent network extension.

items.notes: Spectre 2.0; DIU Blue UAS List cleared; supports up to 8 lb multi-payload configurations including EO/IR cameras and tactical radios.

items.name: HIVE Suite
items.product_type: tethered drone mission packages (RECON, SPEARHEAD, RELAY, SHIELD, NEXUS)

evidence.snippet:
HIVE Tethered Drone Ecosystem
-----------------------------
Hoverfly’s HIVE ecosystem empowers operators with modular, mission-ready ISR and communication capabilities across diverse operational environments. From persistent overwatch to mobile command and live event security, each [HIVE](/hive/) solution is designed for rapid deployment, seamless integration, and unmatched performance—delivering scalable solutions for today’s most critical missions.

items.notes: Five named mission configurations: RECON (persistent ISR), SPEARHEAD (on-the-move), RELAY (VHA comms), SHIELD (live overwatch), NEXUS (unmanned teaming).

evidence.snippet: Hoverfly Spectre is the first and only Tethered UAS platform cleared for the DIU Blue UAS List and verified as secure and NDAA compliant through AUVSI Green UAS.

ndaa.notes: Homepage explicitly states the Spectre is 'verified as secure and NDAA compliant through AUVSI Green UAS'.

evidence.snippet: Hoverfly Spectre is the first and only Tethered UAS platform cleared for the DIU Blue UAS List and verified as secure and NDAA compliant through AUVSI Green UAS.
THE ONLY DIU BLUE LIST CERTIFIED TETHERED UAS

blue_uas.notes: Spectre is explicitly described as 'the first and only Tethered UAS platform cleared for the DIU Blue UAS List'.

evidence.snippet: With an unparalleled legacy of deployments, this single-payload TeUAS is fielded and maintained by our armed forces and has evolved into a critical infrastructure asset for the Integrated Tactical Network.

### Specifications
**Payload Capacity**
5.0-8.0 lbs., dependent on payload power consumption and environmental conditions
**Flight Duration**
Continuous 1500-hour maintenance

readiness.notes: Products are fielded and maintained by US Armed Forces; Spectre has documented specs including 1500-hour continuous maintenance interval and catalog SKUs.

tagline: Manufactures tethered airframes and communications relay systems—Sentry, Spectre, and modular HIVE Suite configurations for persistent ISR, on-the-move overwatch, and tactical comms extension. NDAA-compliant and Blue UAS-certified. Spectre claimed as first tethered platform on DIU cleared list, though independent verification of competitive landscape and technical differentiation claims remains limited in open sources.
